min_entry_age.source_quote: Self only aged between 60 to 80 years at inception

max_entry_age.source_quote: Self only aged between 60 to 80 years at inception

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Plan A – 10 slabs, INR 1,00,000 to INR 10,00,000 in multiple of INR 1,00,000

grace_period.source_quote: Grace Period for payment of the premium shall be thirty days

free_look_period.source_quote: free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the Policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: First 30 days waiting period (Excl 03) a) Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within thirty (30) days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Diseases (Excl 01) a) Expenses related to the treatment of a Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of twenty four (24) months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: until the expiry of twenty four (24) months

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (National Parivar Mediclaim covers 140+ day care procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 5322 Network Hospitals ('Why Choose NICL' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: 1.2.1.1 Limit for Room Charges and Intensive Care Unit Charges under Plan A Room charges and intensive care unit charges per day shall be payable up to the limit as shown in the Table of Benefits.

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: The Policy can be issued for a period of one (01) year

ayush_coverage.source_quote: 1.2.6 AYUSH Treatment The Company shall indemnify the Medical Expenses for In-patient Care, Pre-Hospitalisation expenses and Post-Hospitalisation expenses, incurred for AYUSH treatment, provided the treatment is undergone in an AYUSH Hospital.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity (Excl 18) i. Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections incurred during hospitalization) except ectopic pregnancy

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 1.2.9 Organ Donor's Medical Expenses The Company shall indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred in respect of an organ donor's Hospitalisation during the Policy Period for harvesting of the organ donated to an Insured Person

restoration_benefit.source_quote: Reinstatement of Sum Insured if exhausted due to Road Traffic Accident In the event of available sum insured in respect of the insured/ insured person being exhausted anytime during the policy period

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: 1.2.4 Domiciliary Hosptalisation The Company shall indemnify the medical expenses incurred under domiciliary hospitalisation, including pre hospitalisation expenses and post hospitalisation expenses, up to the limit as shown in the Tab

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: 1.4.2 Preventive Health Check Up 1.4.2.1 Applicable to Plan A Expenses of prescribed diagnostic tests only with respect to the Insured Person(s), shall be reimbursed at the end of a block of two continuous Policy Periods

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility is available, if opted for TPA service, subject to prior approval by the TPA

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: maximum of 50% (fifty percent) of the Sum Insured

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: pre-authorization letter within an hour to the Hospital after verification

room_rent_capping.value: Plan A: 1% of SI per day (max INR 5,000). Plan B: 2% of SI per day (max INR 10,000). No cap if PPN packaged procedure.
room_rent_capping.source_quote: 1.2.1.1 Limit for Room Charges and Intensive Care Unit Charges under Plan A Room charges and intensive care unit charges per day shall be payable up to the limit as shown in the Table of Benefits.

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus allowed shall be an amount equal to 5% (five percent) of Sum Insured
